scripts.package: npm run version && npm run build xiri-ng && cd dist/xiri-ng && npm pack
scripts.publish: npm run version && npm run build && node -e "const pkg = require('./projects/xiri-ng/package.json'); const v = pkg.version; const { execSync } = require('child_process'); execSync('git add projects/xiri-ng/package.json', { stdio: 'inherit' }); execSync('git commit -m \"Bump version to ' + v + '\"', { stdio: 'inherit' }); execSync('git tag -a v' + v + ' -m \"v' + v + '\"', { stdio: 'inherit' }); execSync('git push --follow-tags', { stdio: 'inherit' }); console.log('\\n✅ Released v' + v + ' - GitHub Actions will publish to npm\\n')"
